---
description: "Initialize project context using Sonata. Use after creating a new app, mod, library, or tool skeleton."
name: "Init Sonata"
argument-hint: "Project idea and constraints"
agent: "agent"
---

Use the `init-sonata` skill.

Stay in harness engineering. Respond caveman-terse unless clarity requires normal prose.

Turn the user's rough project idea into durable context in:

- `docs/project-brief.md`
- `docs/architecture/index.md`
- `docs/quality.md`
- `docs/exec-plans/active/` when needed

Keep chat concise. Ask only blocking questions.
